TextView.android:text: ৬টি গুন থাকলেনই বুঝবেন আপনি জান্নাতি | শায়খ আহমাদুল্লাহ | shaikh ahmadullah new waz

Shaikh Ahmadullah is a professional Bangladeshi Islamic Speaker, Islamic scholars. His nickname is Ahmadullah. Do you know? What is the Date of birth of Shaikh Ahmadullah? Where was born Shaikh Ahmadullah? He was born in Bashikpur village of Laxmipur district, Bangladesh on 05 December, 1981 (Saturday) . Everybody want to know that how much age of Shaikh Ahmadullah? Age of Shaikh Ahmadullah is 43 years old. Every person searched that what is the Country, Nationality and Continent of Shaikh Ahmadullah? His Country name is Bangladesh, Nationality is Bangladeshi and Asia Continent. Always came question from mind that What religion does Shaikh Ahmadullah belong to? He belong to Islam Religion.
